title: Reader Outcomes, Publisher Respect, and Product Contract · Spiral Review
summary: A delayed incident review reconstructs reader outcomes, publisher respect, and product contract from source and emitted revision, tenant, URL, validator, bytes, runtime validation, Promise settlement, transaction, lease, response, failure, handle cleanup, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for inclusive feed-reader product contract after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and ev…
objectives: Define reader population, decision, task journey, accepted delay, failure harm, and observable learning or research value.
Specify respectful identification, fetch cadence, caching, correction, deletion, source pause, and incident contact behavior.
Separate source discovery, ingestion, storage, scheduling, API, reader state, and presentation with explicit accepted unknowns.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and TypeScript Separate evidence from confidence · Review Feed Ts Acceptance Matrix
steps.instruction:
review case — A review TypeScript team handles case 8803 during a PostgreSQL lease and migration fault exercise. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to gate reader, publisher, inclusive, privacy, and changed-case product outcomes; every Promise, AbortSignal listener, timer, stream, pool client, transaction, lease, and handle needs an owner; then inject one URL, DNS, redirect, stream, compression, timeout, abort, or publisher-budget failure and settle ownership. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, fast-xml-parser, Express, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, handle and load claims, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Define changed-format, malformed XML, stale response, async reorder, tenant, cancellation, restore, and unfamiliar-reader cases.

Inspect the Feed Ts Acceptance Matrix trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Feed aggregation and TypeScript Separate evidence from confidence · Review Feed Ts Acceptance Matrix.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for define changed-format, malformed xml, stale response, async reorder, tenant, cancellation, restore, and unfamiliar-reader cases. For Feed aggregation and TypeScript Separate evidence from confidence · Review Feed Ts Acceptance Matrix, keep Feed Ts Acceptance Matrix connected to executable TypeScript unknown-validation, async, PostgreSQL, Express, reader, package, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.
